guideContainer.name: guide1
guideContainer.thankYouMessage: Thank you for submitting the form.

guidetextdraw._value: Please provide following details to process your application
guidetextdraw.name: headerLine

panel.jcr:title: Applicant Details
panel.name: pnlApplicantDetails

fd:scripts.fd:init: [{"script":{"field":"guide.guideRootPanel.pnlApplicantDetails.pnlRow1.firstName"\,"event":"Initialize"\,"model":{"nodeName":"EVENT_SCRIPTS"}\,"content":"$(document).on(\\"input\\"\, \\".firstname input\\"\, function () {\\n\\n let value = $(this).val();\\n\\n value = value.replace(/[^a-zA-Z]/g\, '');\\n\\n if(value.length > 0){\\n value = value.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + value.slice(1);\\n }\\n\\n $(this).val(value);\\n\\n});"}\,"nodeName":"SCRIPTMODEL"\,"version":1\,"enabled":true}]

[{"script":{"content":"$(document).on(\\"input\\"\, \\".middlename input\\"\, function () {\\n\\n let value = $(this).val();\\n\\n value = value.replace(/[^a-zA-Z]/g\, '');\\n\\n if(value.length > 0){\\n value = value.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + value.slice(1);\\n }\\n\\n $(this).val(value);\\n\\n});"\,"event":"Initialize"\,"field":"guide.guideRootPanel.pnlApplicantDetails.pnlRow1.middleName"}\,"nodeName":"SCRIPTMODEL"\,"version":1\,"enabled":true}]

[{"script":{"content":"$(document).on(\\"input\\"\, \\".lastname input\\"\, function () {\\n\\n let value = $(this).val();\\n\\n value = value.replace(/[^a-zA-Z]/g\, '');\\n\\n if(value.length > 0){\\n value = value.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + value.slice(1);\\n }\\n\\n $(this).val(value);\\n\\n});"\,"event":"Initialize"\,"field":"guide.guideRootPanel.pnlApplicantDetails.pnlRow1.lastName"}\,"nodeName":"SCRIPTMODEL"\,"version":1\,"enabled":true}]

guideemail.name: personalEmail

panel_copy_976345156.name: pnlRow3

guidedateinput.name: dob

guidetextbox_6599823.jcr:title: Company Name
guidetextbox_6599823.name: companyName

fd:scripts.fd:init: [{"script":{"content":"$(document).on(\\"input\\"\, \\".companyname input\\"\, function () {\\n\\n let value = $(this).val();\\n\\n value = value.replace(/[^a-zA-Z]/g\, '');\\n\\n if(value.length > 0){\\n value = value.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + value.slice(1);\\n }\\n\\n $(this).val(value);\\n\\n});"\,"event":"Initialize"\,"field":"guide.guideRootPanel.pnlApplicantDetails.pnlRow3.companyName"}\,"nodeName":"SCRIPTMODEL"\,"version":1\,"enabled":false}]

guidetextbox_1394643.jcr:title: Address source
guidetextbox_1394643.name: addressSource
guidetextbox_1394643.options: [Get your address prefilled from the records with our government approved partner Equifax,Enter Manually]

fd:rules.fd:valueCommit: [{"nodeName":"ROOT"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"STATEMENT"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"EVENT_SCRIPTS"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"EVENT_CONDITION"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"BINARY_EVENT_CONDITION"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"EVENT_CONDITION"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"EVENT_AND_COMPARISON"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"COMPONENT"\,"value":{"id":"guide.guideRootPanel.pnlResidenceAddress.addressSource"\,"type":"STRING"\,"name":"addressSource"}}\,{"nodeName":"EVENT_AND_COMPARISON_OPERATOR"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"is changed"\,"value":null}}\,{"nodeName":"PRIMITIVE_EXPRESSION"\,"choice":null}]}\,"nested":false}\,{"nodeName":"OPERATOR"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"AND"\,"value":null}}\,{"nodeName":"EVENT_CONDITION"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"EVENT_AND_COMPARISON"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"COMPONENT"\,"value":{"id":"guide.guideRootPanel.pnlResidenceAddress.addressSource"\,"type":"STRING"\,"name":"addressSource"}}\,{"nodeName":"EVENT_AND_COMPARISON_OPERATOR"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"EQUALS_TO"\,"value":null}}\,{"nodeName":"PRIMITIVE_EXPRESSION"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"STRING_LITERAL"\,"value":"Get your address prefilled from the records with our government approved partner Equifax"}}]}\,"nested":false}]}\,"nested":false}\,{"nodeName":"Then"\,"value":null}\,{"nodeName":"BLOCK_STATEMENTS"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"BLOCK_STATEMENT"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"SHOW_STATEMENT"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"AFCOMPONENT"\,"value":{"id":"guide.guideRootPanel.pnlResidenceAddress.abc"\,"displayName":"abc"\,"type":"AFCOMPONENT"\,"displayPath":"FORM/Root Panel/Residence Address/abc/"\,"name":"abc"\,"parent":"guide.guideRootPanel.pnlResidenceAddress"}}]}}\,{"nodeName":"BLOCK_STATEMENT"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"HIDE_STATEMENT"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"AFCOMPONENT"\,"value":{"id":"guide.guideRootPanel.pnlResidenceAddress.addressPanel"\,"displayName":"Address Panel"\,"type":"AFCOMPONENT"\,"displayPath":"FORM/Root Panel/Residence Address/Address Panel/"\,"name":"addressPanel"\,"parent":"guide.guideRootPanel.pnlResidenceAddress"}}]}}]}]}}]\,"isValid":true\,"enabled":true\,"version":1\,"script":"/**\\n\\n * This is a machine-generated code for the rule.\\n * If you modify it in the code editor\, you will not be able to view and edit the rule in the visual editor.\\n */\\n\\nif ( ( (true) && this.value == \\"Get your address prefilled from the records with our government approved partner Equifax\\" ) ) {\\n abc.visible = true;\\n addressPanel.visible = false;\\n}\\n"\,"eventName":"Value Commit"\,"ruleType":""\,"description":""},{"nodeName":"ROOT"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"STATEMENT"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"EVENT_SCRIPTS"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"EVENT_CONDITION"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"BINARY_EVENT_CONDITION"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"EVENT_CONDITION"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"EVENT_AND_COMPARISON"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"COMPONENT"\,"value":{"id":"guide.guideRootPanel.pnlResidenceAddress.addressSource"\,"type":"STRING"\,"name":"addressSource"}}\,{"nodeName":"EVENT_AND_COMPARISON_OPERATOR"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"is changed"\,"value":null}}\,{"nodeName":"PRIMITIVE_EXPRESSION"\,"choice":null}]}\,"nested":false}\,{"nodeName":"OPERATOR"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"AND"\,"value":null}}\,{"nodeName":"EVENT_CONDITION"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"EVENT_AND_COMPARISON"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"COMPONENT"\,"value":{"id":"guide.guideRootPanel.pnlResidenceAddress.addressSource"\,"type":"STRING"\,"name":"addressSource"}}\,{"nodeName":"EVENT_AND_COMPARISON_OPERATOR"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"EQUALS_TO"\,"value":null}}\,{"nodeName":"PRIMITIVE_EXPRESSION"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"STRING_LITERAL"\,"value":"Enter Manually"}}]}\,"nested":false}]}\,"nested":false}\,{"nodeName":"Then"\,"value":null}\,{"nodeName":"BLOCK_STATEMENTS"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"BLOCK_STATEMENT"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"HIDE_STATEMENT"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"AFCOMPONENT"\,"value":{"id":"guide.guideRootPanel.pnlResidenceAddress.abc"\,"displayName":"abc"\,"type":"AFCOMPONENT"\,"displayPath":"FORM/Root Panel/Residence Address/abc/"\,"name":"abc"\,"parent":"guide.guideRootPanel.pnlResidenceAddress"}}]}}\,{"nodeName":"BLOCK_STATEMENT"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"SHOW_STATEMENT"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"AFCOMPONENT"\,"value":{"id":"guide.guideRootPanel.pnlResidenceAddress.addressPanel"\,"displayName":"Address Panel"\,"type":"AFCOMPONENT"\,"displayPath":"FORM/Root Panel/Residence Address/Address Panel/"\,"name":"addressPanel"\,"parent":"guide.guideRootPanel.pnlResidenceAddress"}}]}}]}]}}]\,"isValid":true\,"enabled":true\,"version":1\,"script":"/**\\n\\n * This is a machine-generated code for the rule.\\n * If you modify it in the code editor\, you will not be able to view and edit the rule in the visual editor.\\n */\\n\\nif ( ( (true) && this.value == \\"Enter Manually\\" ) ) {\\n abc.visible = false;\\n addressPanel.visible = true;\\n}\\n"\,"eventName":"Value Commit"\,"ruleType":""\,"description":""}]

panel.jcr:title: Address Panel
panel.name: addressPanel

fd:scripts.fd:init: [{"script":{"content":"$(document).on(\\"input\\"\, \\".addressLine1 input\\"\, function () {\\n\\n let value = $(this).val();\\n\\n if (value.length >= 30) {\\n $(\\".addressLine2 input\\").focus();\\n }\\n\\n});"\,"event":"Initialize"\,"field":"guide.guideRootPanel.pnlResidenceAddress.addressLine1"}\,"nodeName":"SCRIPTMODEL"\,"version":1\,"enabled":true}]

[{"script":{"content":"$(document).on(\\"input\\"\, \\".addressLine2 input\\"\, function () {\\n\\n let value = $(this).val();\\n\\n if (value.length > 30) {\\n\\n this.setCustomValidity(\\"Address cannot exceed 60 characters.\\");\\n this.reportValidity();\\n\\n } else {\\n\\n this.setCustomValidity(\\"\\");\\n\\n }\\n\\n});"\,"event":"Initialize"\,"field":"guide.guideRootPanel.pnlResidenceAddress.addressLine2"}\,"nodeName":"SCRIPTMODEL"\,"version":1\,"enabled":true}]

[{"script":{"content":"$(document).ready(function(){\\n \\n let switchNode = guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"channelSwitch\\");\\n\\nif (switchNode) {\\n switchNode.enabled = false;\\n}\\n\\n $(document).on(\\"input\\"\, \\".pincode input\\"\, function () {\\n\\n let pincode = this.value;\\n\\n if (pincode.length !== 6) {\\n\\n let switchNode = guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"channelSwitch\\");\\n\\n if (switchNode) {\\n switchNode.enabled = false;\\n switchNode.value = false;\\n }\\n\\n let cityNode = guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"city\\");\\n let stateNode = guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"state\\");\\n\\n if (cityNode) {\\n cityNode.value = \\"\\";\\n cityNode.enabled = true;\\n }\\n\\n if (stateNode) {\\n stateNode.value = \\"\\";\\n stateNode.enabled = true;\\n }\\n\\n let panel = guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"channelDetailsPanel\\");\\n\\n if (panel) {\\n panel.visible = false;\\n }\\n\\n return;\\n}\\n\\n fetch(\\"/content/pincode.json?pincode=\\" + pincode)\\n .then(res => res.json())\\n .then(data => {\\n\\n let cityNode = guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"city\\");\\n let stateNode = guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"state\\");\\n \\n\\n\\n\\n if (data.success) {\\n let switchNode = guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"channelSwitch\\");\\n \\n if (switchNode) {\\n switchNode.enabled = true;\\n }\\n\\n if (cityNode) cityNode.value = data.city;\\n if (stateNode) stateNode.value = data.state;\\n\\n if (cityNode) cityNode.enabled = false;\\n if (stateNode) stateNode.enabled = false;\\n\\n setTimeout(() => {\\n\\n let cityInput = document.querySelector(\\".city input\\");\\n let stateInput = document.querySelector(\\".state input\\");\\n\\n if (cityInput) {\\n cityInput.setAttribute(\\"readonly\\"\, true);\\n cityInput.style.backgroundColor = \\"#f2f2f2\\";\\n }\\n\\n if (stateInput) {\\n stateInput.setAttribute(\\"readonly\\"\, true);\\n stateInput.style.backgroundColor = \\"#f2f2f2\\";\\n }\\n\\n }\, 50);\\n\\n } else {\\n \\n let switchNode = guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"channelSwitch\\");\\n\\n if (switchNode) {\\n switchNode.enabled = false;\\n switchNode.value = false;\\n }\\n\\n if (cityNode) {\\n cityNode.value = \\"\\";\\n cityNode.enabled = true;\\n }\\n\\n if (stateNode) {\\n stateNode.value = \\"\\";\\n stateNode.enabled = true;\\n }\\n\\n setTimeout(() => {\\n\\n let cityInput = document.querySelector(\\".city input\\");\\n let stateInput = document.querySelector(\\".state input\\");\\n\\n if (cityInput) {\\n cityInput.removeAttribute(\\"readonly\\");\\n cityInput.style.backgroundColor = \\"\\";\\n }\\n\\n if (stateInput) {\\n stateInput.removeAttribute(\\"readonly\\");\\n stateInput.style.backgroundColor = \\"\\";\\n }\\n\\n }\, 50);\\n\\n }\\n\\n })\\n .catch(error => {\\n console.error(\\"Pincode API Error:\\"\, error);\\n });\\n\\n});\\n \\n });"\,"event":"Initialize"\,"field":"guide.guideRootPanel.pnlResidenceAddress.addressPanel.pincode"}\,"nodeName":"SCRIPTMODEL"\,"version":1\,"enabled":true}]

guidetextbox_1394643.jcr:title: Permanant Address source
guidetextbox_1394643.name: permanantAddressSource
guidetextbox_1394643.options: [Get your address prefilled from the records with our government approved partner Equifax,Enter Manually]

fd:rules.fd:valueCommit: [{"nodeName":"ROOT"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"STATEMENT"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"EVENT_SCRIPTS"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"EVENT_CONDITION"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"BINARY_EVENT_CONDITION"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"EVENT_CONDITION"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"EVENT_AND_COMPARISON"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"COMPONENT"\,"value":{"id":"guide.guideRootPanel.pnlPermanantAddress.permanantAddressSource"\,"type":"RADIO BUTTON|FIELD|AFCOMPONENT|STRING"\,"name":"permanantAddressSource"}}\,{"nodeName":"EVENT_AND_COMPARISON_OPERATOR"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"is changed"\,"value":null}}\,{"nodeName":"PRIMITIVE_EXPRESSION"\,"choice":null}]}\,"nested":false}\,{"nodeName":"OPERATOR"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"AND"\,"value":null}}\,{"nodeName":"EVENT_CONDITION"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"EVENT_AND_COMPARISON"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"COMPONENT"\,"value":{"id":"guide.guideRootPanel.pnlPermanantAddress.permanantAddressSource"\,"type":"RADIO your address prefilled from the records with our government approved partner Equifax"}}]}\,"nested":false}]}\,"nested":false}\,{"nodeName":"Then"\,"value":null}\,{"nodeName":"BLOCK_STATEMENTS"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"BLOCK_STATEMENT"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"HIDE_STATEMENT"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"AFCOMPONENT"\,"value":{"id":"guide.guideRootPanel.pnlPermanantAddress.permanantAddressPanel"\,"displayName":"Permanant Address Panel"\,"type":"AFCOMPONENT"\,"displayPath":"FORM/Root Panel/Permanant Address/Permanant Address Panel/"\,"name":"permanantAddressPanel"\,"parent":"guide.guideRootPanel.pnlPermanantAddress"}}]}}\,{"nodeName":"BLOCK_STATEMENT"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"SHOW_STATEMENT"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"AFCOMPONENT"\,"value":{"id":"guide.guideRootPanel.pnlPermanantAddress.permanantabc"\,"displayName":"abc"\,"type":"AFCOMPONENT"\,"isDuplicate":true\,"displayPath":"FORM/Root Panel/Permanant Address/abc/"\,"name":"permanantabc"\,"parent":"guide.guideRootPanel.pnlPermanantAddress"}}]}}]}]}}]\,"isValid":true\,"enabled":true\,"version":1\,"script":"/**\\n\\n * This is a machine-generated code for the rule.\\n * If you modify it in the code editor\, you will not be able to view and edit the rule in the visual editor.\\n */\\n\\nif ( ( (true) && this.value == \\"Get your address prefilled from the records with our government approved partner Equifax\\" ) ) {\\n permanantAddressPanel.visible = false;\\n permanantabc.visible = true;\\n}\\n"\,"eventName":"Value Commit"\,"ruleType":""\,"description":""},{"nodeName":"ROOT"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"STATEMENT"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"EVENT_SCRIPTS"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"EVENT_CONDITION"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"BINARY_EVENT_CONDITION"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"EVENT_CONDITION"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"EVENT_AND_COMPARISON"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"COMPONENT"\,"value":{"id":"guide.guideRootPanel.pnlPermanantAddress.permanantAddressSource"\,"type":"STRING"\,"name":"permanantAddressSource"}}\,{"nodeName":"EVENT_AND_COMPARISON_OPERATOR"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"is changed"\,"value":null}}\,{"nodeName":"PRIMITIVE_EXPRESSION"\,"choice":null}]}\,"nested":false}\,{"nodeName":"OPERATOR"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"AND"\,"value":null}}\,{"nodeName":"EVENT_CONDITION"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"EVENT_AND_COMPARISON"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"COMPONENT"\,"value":{"id":"guide.guideRootPanel.pnlPermanantAddress.permanantAddressSource"\,"type":"STRING"\,"name":"permanantAddressSource"}}\,{"nodeName":"EVENT_AND_COMPARISON_OPERATOR"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"EQUALS_TO"\,"value":null}}\,{"nodeName":"PRIMITIVE_EXPRESSION"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"STRING_LITERAL"\,"value":"Enter Manually"}}]}\,"nested":false}]}\,"nested":false}\,{"nodeName":"Then"\,"value":null}\,{"nodeName":"BLOCK_STATEMENTS"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"BLOCK_STATEMENT"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"HIDE_STATEMENT"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"AFCOMPONENT"\,"value":{"id":"guide.guideRootPanel.pnlPermanantAddress.permanantabc"\,"displayName":"abc"\,"type":"AFCOMPONENT"\,"isDuplicate":true\,"displayPath":"FORM/Root Panel/Permanant Address/abc/"\,"name":"permanantabc"\,"parent":"guide.guideRootPanel.pnlPermanantAddress"}}]}}\,{"nodeName":"BLOCK_STATEMENT"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"SHOW_STATEMENT"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"AFCOMPONENT"\,"value":{"id":"guide.guideRootPanel.pnlPermanantAddress.permanantAddressPanel"\,"displayName":"Permanant Address Panel"\,"type":"AFCOMPONENT"\,"displayPath":"FORM/Root Panel/Permanant Address/Permanant Address Panel/"\,"name":"permanantAddressPanel"\,"parent":"guide.guideRootPanel.pnlPermanantAddress"}}]}}]}]}}]\,"isValid":true\,"enabled":true\,"version":1\,"script":"/**\\n\\n * This is a machine-generated code for the rule.\\n * If you modify it in the code editor\, you will not be able to view and edit the rule in the visual editor.\\n */\\n\\nif ( ( (true) && this.value == \\"Enter Manually\\" ) ) {\\n permanantabc.visible = false;\\n permanantAddressPanel.visible = true;\\n}\\n"\,"eventName":"Value Commit"\,"ruleType":""\,"description":""}]

panel.jcr:title: Permanant Address Panel
panel.name: permanantAddressPanel

fd:scripts.fd:init: [{"script":{"content":"$(document).on(\\"input\\"\, \\".PermanantAddressLine1 input\\"\, function () {\\n\\n let value = $(this).val();\\n\\n if (value.length >= 30) {\\n $(\\".permanantAddressLine2 input\\").focus();\\n }\\n\\n});"\,"event":"Initialize"\,"field":"guide.guideRootPanel.pnlPermanantAddress.PermanantAddressLine1"}\,"nodeName":"SCRIPTMODEL"\,"version":1\,"enabled":true}]

[{"script":{"content":"$(document).on(\\"input\\"\, \\".permanantAddressLine2 input\\"\, function () {\\n\\n let value = $(this).val();\\n\\n if (value.length > 30) {\\n\\n this.setCustomValidity(\\"Address cannot exceed 60 characters.\\");\\n this.reportValidity();\\n\\n } else {\\n\\n this.setCustomValidity(\\"\\");\\n\\n }\\n\\n});"\,"event":"Initialize"\,"field":"guide.guideRootPanel.pnlPermanantAddress.permanantAddressLine2"}\,"nodeName":"SCRIPTMODEL"\,"version":1\,"enabled":true}]

[{"script":{"content":"$(document).ready(function(){\\n\\n$(document).on(\\"input\\"\, \\".permanantPincode input\\"\, function () {\\n\\n let ppincode = this.value;\\n\\n if (ppincode.length !== 6) return;\\n\\n fetch(\\"/content/pincode.json?pincode=\\" + ppincode)\\n .then(res => res.json())\\n .then(data => {\\n\\n let pcityNode = guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"permanantAddressCity\\");\\n let pstateNode = guideBridge.resolveNode(\\"permanantAddressState\\");\\n\\n if (data.success) {\\n\\n if (pcityNode) pcityNode.value = data.city;\\n if (pstateNode) pstateNode.value = data.state;\\n\\n if (pcityNode) pcityNode.enabled = false;\\n if (pstateNode) pstateNode.enabled = false;\\n\\n setTimeout(() => {\\n\\n let pcityInput = document.querySelector(\\".permanantCity input\\");\\n let pstateInput = document.querySelector(\\".permanantState input\\");\\n\\n if (pcityInput) {\\n pcityInput.setAttribute(\\"readonly\\"\, true);\\n pcityInput.style.backgroundColor = \\"#f2f2f2\\";\\n }\\n\\n if (pstateInput) {\\n pstateInput.setAttribute(\\"readonly\\"\, true);\\n pstateInput.style.backgroundColor = \\"#f2f2f2\\";\\n }\\n\\n }\, 50);\\n\\n } else {\\n\\n if (pcityNode) {\\n pcityNode.value = \\"\\";\\n pcityNode.enabled = true;\\n }\\n\\n if (pstateNode) {\\n pstateNode.value = \\"\\";\\n pstateNode.enabled = true;\\n }\\n\\n setTimeout(() => {\\n\\n let pcityInput = document.querySelector(\\".permanantCity input\\");\\n let pstateInput = document.querySelector(\\".permanantState input\\");\\n\\n if (pcityInput) {\\n pcityInput.removeAttribute(\\"readonly\\");\\n pcityInput.style.backgroundColor = \\"\\";\\n }\\n\\n if (pstateInput) {\\n pstateInput.removeAttribute(\\"readonly\\");\\n pstateInput.style.backgroundColor = \\"\\";\\n }\\n\\n }\, 50);\\n\\n }\\n\\n })\\n .catch(error => {\\n console.error(\\"Pincode API Error:\\"\, error);\\n });\\n\\n});\\n \\n });"\,"event":"Initialize"\,"field":"guide.guideRootPanel.pnlPermanantAddress.permanantAddressPanel.permanantAddressPincode"}\,"nodeName":"SCRIPTMODEL"\,"version":1\,"enabled":true}]

guidecheckbox.name: consentCheckbox
guidecheckbox.options: [I understand and hereby give my consent to use bureau details and information provided by me and/or information already held by HDFC Bank (if any) to evaluate my eligibility. I agree to the Terms & Conditions set by the Bank.]

guidetextdraw_183824._value: I am being assisted by HDFC Bank Employee
guidetextdraw_183824.name: bankUseOnlySwitchText

guidedropdownlist_1516936418.jcr:title: Sales Promo Code
guidedropdownlist_1516936418.name: salesPromoCode
guidedropdownlist_1516936418.options: [GOLDEN EDGE,NORMAL SCHEME,PL SAL ELITE GOLD_VCIP,PL SAL BT EXPL_VCIP,Balance Transfer]

fd:rules.fd:click: [{"nodeName":"ROOT"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"STATEMENT"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"EVENT_SCRIPTS"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"EVENT_CONDITION"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"EVENT_AND_COMPARISON"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"COMPONENT"\,"value":{"id":"XX"\,"type":"BUTTON"\,"name":"XX"}}\,{"nodeName":"EVENT_AND_COMPARISON_OPERATOR"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"is clicked"\,"value":null}}\,{"nodeName":"PRIMITIVE_EXPRESSION"\,"choice":null}]}\,"nested":false}\,{"nodeName":"Then"\,"value":null}\,{"nodeName":"BLOCK_STATEMENTS"\,"items":[{"nodeName":"BLOCK_STATEMENT"\,"choice":{"nodeName":"SUBMIT_FORM"\,"items":[]}}]}]}}]\,"isValid":true\,"enabled":true\,"version":1\,"script":"/**\\n\\n * This is a machine-generated code for the rule.\\n * If you modify it in the code editor\, you will not be able to view and edit the rule in the visual editor.\\n */\\n\\nguideBridge.submit();\\n\\n"\,"eventName":"Click"}]
